app.title: AI Trading Demo
app.subtitle: Demo · High-density trading workspace · Not real prices or investment advice

chart.title: Main chart · TradingView Lightweight Charts
chart.hint: Pick a symbol from the watchlist; multi-timeframe + MA demo; OHLC is locally generated.

trade.title: Quick trade
trade.marginNote: Demo formula: notional ÷ leverage; contract multiplier is illustrative only.
trade.toastBuy: Demo fill: {{ticket}} · buy {{vol}} lot(s) @ {{price}} (not routed to a real venue)
trade.toastSell: Demo fill: {{ticket}} · sell {{vol}} lot(s) @ {{price}} (not routed to a real venue)

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Positions · Working orders · Fills · Equity
portfolio.equityCaption: Illustrative equity path (synthetic random walk — not a backtest)

ai.title: AI strategy assistant
ai.subtitle: Sentiment / levels + canned streaming replies
ai.placeholder: Type a message or pick an intent below…
ai.hintBubble: Tap to open — chat with the AI here.
ai.dragHint: Drag vertically · Tap to open the side drawer
ai.voiceUnsupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser. Please type your message.

lowerDeck.volumeSub: Synthetic volume bars derived from OHLC ranges — mimics the volume strip under a main chart
lowerDeck.depthSub: Static bid/ask ladder placeholder — not a real order book
lowerDeck.volatilitySub: Mock implied-volatility line to add a second time-series chart
lowerDeck.compareSub: Side-by-side H1 candles — closer to a multi-chart terminal layout
lowerDeck.flowSub: Retail / institutional / hedge share bars — visual placeholder only
lowerDeck.flowNote: Percentages and colors are layout-only; they are not real market statistics.

footer.title: Disclaimer
footer.p1: This page and the extended modules below are UI demos: prices, depth, volume, volatility, and flow visuals are synthesized or static placeholders — not investment advice.
footer.p2: The AI assistant uses canned scripts and simulated streaming; it is not real research or order routing. Do not treat this demo as a production trading system.
footer.p3: If you reuse this demo in a real product, add your own compliance copy, suitability notices, and operational risk controls.
